message.content:
THE FULL JOURNEY  
From Completed Job to Posted Proof —  
Automatically  

[Icon: Teal circle with white checkmark] Job / Order Completed → [Icon: Green circle with white @ symbol] Review Request (WhatsApp/SMS/Email) → [Icon: Orange circle with white clock] 2-Day Follow-Up If No Reply → [Icon: Blue circle with white star] Customer Rates  

[Teal box with thumbs-up icon] 5★ → Public + Social Proof  
Google review → AI reply posted → Instagram Story → Facebook / Instagram post or Reel.  

[Orange box with thumbs-down icon] 1–4★ → Recover Privately  
AI captures what went wrong → tailored reply → discount/coupon for next order → team notified.
